modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_copper = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_total
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_base_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_base_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_base_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_base_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_base
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_building_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_building_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_building_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_building_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_building
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_foreign_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_foreign_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_foreign_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_foreign_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_foreign
		}
	}
}

	scope:modeu5_seller_country = {

					name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_seller_stock_before_raw

			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_seller_stock_before_raw

			}
		}
	}
	scope:modeu5_buyer_country = {

				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market

		}
		else = {

			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {

				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_source_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_source_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_copper_market_stock|scope:modeu5_source_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_source_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_target_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_copper_market_stock|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_target_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_copper = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_seller_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_source_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_source_market
				value = scope:modeu5_seller_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_buyer_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_target_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
				value = scope:modeu5_buyer_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			value = scope:modeu5_source_market_stock_after
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			value = scope:modeu5_target_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}

modeu5_read_country_stock_record_good_copper = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_load_capacity_breakdown_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_read_country_stock_record_calculate = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_stock_record = yes
}

modeu5_recalculate_country_market_capacity_good_copper = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_calculate_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_finalize_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_market_capacity = yes
}

modeu5_add_stock_good_copper = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_add_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_copper = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_add_stock = yes
}

modeu5_remove_stock_good_copper = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_remove_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_copper = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_remove_stock = yes
}

modeu5_transfer_stock_good_copper = {
	modeu5_load_transfer_records_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_transfer_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_copper = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_source_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_copper = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:modeu5_source_market != scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
			scope:modeu5_target_market = {
				save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
			}
			modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_copper = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_transfer_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_good_copper = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_decay_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_copper = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_copper = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_decay_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_default_good_copper = {
	modeu5_decay_stock = {
		country = scope:modeu5_default_decay_country
		market = scope:modeu5_default_decay_market
		good = copper
		decay_rate = modeu5_default_monthly_decay_rate
	}
}

modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_copper = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_copper_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_copper = {
	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
	}

	every_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_copper_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_copper_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
			scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
					add = scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				}
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
					add = 1
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock < 0 }
				scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
					set_local_variable = {
						name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
						value = 1
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
					name = modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					value = "variable_map(modeu5_copper_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock > scope:modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					}
					scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
						set_local_variable = {
							name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
							value = 1
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_expected_market_stock
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_country_source_count
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_country_source_count
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_negative_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
		}
	}

	modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_copper = yes
}

modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_copper = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_expected_market_stock
	}
}

modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_copper = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_rebuild_market_stock = yes
}

modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_good_copper = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_copper = yes
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_prepare = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_validation_difference_before != 0 }
		modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_copper = yes
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_validation_rebuild_called
			value = 1
		}
		modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_copper = yes
	}
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_finalize = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_validate_stock_consistency = yes
}

modeu5_validate_dirty_markets_good_copper = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_copper_dirty_markets }
		every_in_global_list = {
			variable = modeu5_copper_dirty_markets
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
			scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
				modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
					market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
					good = copper
				}
				modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
			}
		}
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_copper_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_validate_all_markets_good_copper = {
	every_market_in_world = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
		scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
			modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
				market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
				good = copper
			}
			modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_copper = yes
}

# Fault injection for the deterministic CORE-01.6 test only.
modeu5_debug_corrupt_market_stock_good_copper = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_copper_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_debug_corrupted_market_stock
	}
	scope:modeu5_market = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
	}
	modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_copper = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_location_good_copper = {
	goods:copper = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_location_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_loser
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_winner
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = copper
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_location_good_transfer = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_residual_good_copper = {
	goods:copper = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_residual_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_target
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_successor
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = copper
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_residual_good_transfer = yes
}

# Literal persistence adapter for goods_gold.

modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets }
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = {
				is_target_in_global_variable_list = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets
					target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
}

modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets }
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_load_stock_record_good_goods_gold = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_stock_record_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_country = {

				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
				value = scope:modeu5_country_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_goods_gold = {

				}

			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_total
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_base_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_base_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_base_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_base_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_base
		}

				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_building_capacity_by_market

				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_building_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_building_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_building
		}

		if = {
			limit = {

				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_foreign_capacity_by_market

				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_foreign_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_foreign_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_foreign
		}
	}
}

				}
			}

				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock

			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			value = scope:modeu5_source_market_stock_after
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}

			name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			value = scope:modeu5_target_market_stock_after
		}
	}

	modeu5_calculate_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_finalize_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_market_capacity = yes
}

modeu5_add_stock_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_add_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_add_stock = yes
}

modeu5_remove_stock_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_remove_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_remove_stock = yes
}

modeu5_transfer_stock_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_load_transfer_records_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_transfer_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_goods_gold = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_source_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:modeu5_source_market != scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
			scope:modeu5_target_market = {
				save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
			}
			modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_transfer_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_decay_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_goods_gold = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_decay_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_default_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_decay_stock = {
		country = scope:modeu5_default_decay_country
		market = scope:modeu5_default_decay_market
		good = goods_gold
		decay_rate = modeu5_default_monthly_decay_rate
	}
}

modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_goods_gold = {
	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
	}

	every_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_goods_gold_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
			scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
					add = scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				}
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
					add = 1
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock < 0 }
				scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
					set_local_variable = {
						name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
						value = 1
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
					name = modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					value = "variable_map(modeu5_goods_gold_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock > scope:modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					}
					scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
						set_local_variable = {
							name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
							value = 1
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_expected_market_stock
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_country_source_count
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_country_source_count
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_negative_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
		}
	}

	modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_goods_gold = yes
}

modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_expected_market_stock
	}
}

modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_rebuild_market_stock = yes
}

modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_good_goods_gold = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_goods_gold = yes
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_prepare = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_validation_difference_before != 0 }
		modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_goods_gold = yes
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_validation_rebuild_called
			value = 1
		}
		modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_goods_gold = yes
	}
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_finalize = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_validate_stock_consistency = yes
}

modeu5_validate_dirty_markets_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets }
		every_in_global_list = {
			variable = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
			scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
				modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
					market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
					good = goods_gold
				}
				modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
			}
		}
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_goods_gold_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_validate_all_markets_good_goods_gold = {
	every_market_in_world = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
		scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
			modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
				market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
				good = goods_gold
			}
			modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_goods_gold = yes
}

# Fault injection for the deterministic CORE-01.6 test only.
modeu5_debug_corrupt_market_stock_good_goods_gold = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_goods_gold_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_debug_corrupted_market_stock
	}
	scope:modeu5_market = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
	}
	modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_goods_gold = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_location_good_goods_gold = {
	goods:goods_gold = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_location_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_loser
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_winner
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = goods_gold
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_location_good_transfer = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_residual_good_goods_gold = {
	goods:goods_gold = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_residual_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_target
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_successor
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = goods_gold
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_residual_good_transfer = yes
}

# Literal persistence adapter for silver.

modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets }
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = {
				is_target_in_global_variable_list = {
					name = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets
					target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
}

modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets }
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_load_stock_record_good_silver = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_silver_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_stock_record_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
				value = scope:modeu5_country_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_silver = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {

			limit = {

				is_key_in_variable_map = {

			name = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_total
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_base_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_base_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_base_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_base_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_base
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_building_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_building_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_building_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_building_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_building
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_foreign_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_foreign_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_foreign_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_foreign_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_foreign
		}
	}
}

modeu5_load_transfer_records_good_silver = {
	scope:modeu5_seller_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_seller_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_source_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_seller_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	scope:modeu5_buyer_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_source_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_source_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_silver_market_stock|scope:modeu5_source_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_source_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_target_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_silver_market_stock|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_target_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_seller_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_source_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_source_market
				value = scope:modeu5_seller_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_buyer_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_target_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
				value = scope:modeu5_buyer_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			value = scope:modeu5_source_market_stock_after
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			value = scope:modeu5_target_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}

modeu5_read_country_stock_record_good_silver = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_load_capacity_breakdown_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_read_country_stock_record_calculate = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_stock_record = yes
}

modeu5_recalculate_country_market_capacity_good_silver = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_calculate_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_finalize_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_market_capacity = yes
}

modeu5_add_stock_good_silver = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_add_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_add_stock = yes
}

modeu5_remove_stock_good_silver = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_remove_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_remove_stock = yes
}

modeu5_transfer_stock_good_silver = {
	modeu5_load_transfer_records_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_transfer_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_silver = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_source_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:modeu5_source_market != scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
			scope:modeu5_target_market = {
				save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
			}
			modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_transfer_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_good_silver = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_decay_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_silver = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}

		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = yes

modeu5_decay_stock_default_good_silver = {
	modeu5_decay_stock = {
		country = scope:modeu5_default_decay_country
		market = scope:modeu5_default_decay_market
		good = silver
		decay_rate = modeu5_default_monthly_decay_rate
	}
}

modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_silver_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_silver = {
	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
	}

	every_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_silver_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
			scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
					add = scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				}
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
					add = 1
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock < 0 }
				scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
					set_local_variable = {
						name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
						value = 1
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
					name = modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					value = "variable_map(modeu5_silver_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock > scope:modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					}
					scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
						set_local_variable = {
							name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
							value = 1
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_expected_market_stock
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_country_source_count
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_country_source_count
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_negative_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
		}
	}

	modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_silver = yes
}

modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_expected_market_stock
	}
}

modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_silver = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_rebuild_market_stock = yes
}

modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_good_silver = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_silver = yes
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_prepare = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_validation_difference_before != 0 }
		modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_silver = yes
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_validation_rebuild_called
			value = 1
		}
		modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_silver = yes
	}
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_finalize = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_validate_stock_consistency = yes
}

modeu5_validate_dirty_markets_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets }
		every_in_global_list = {
			variable = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
			scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
				modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
					market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
					good = silver
				}
				modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
			}
		}
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_silver_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_validate_all_markets_good_silver = {
	every_market_in_world = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
		scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
			modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
				market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
				good = silver
			}
			modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_silver = yes
}

# Fault injection for the deterministic CORE-01.6 test only.
modeu5_debug_corrupt_market_stock_good_silver = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_silver_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_debug_corrupted_market_stock
	}
	scope:modeu5_market = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
	}
	modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_silver = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_location_good_silver = {
	goods:silver = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_location_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_loser
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_winner
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = silver
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_location_good_transfer = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_residual_good_silver = {
	goods:silver = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_residual_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_target
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_successor
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = silver
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_residual_good_transfer = yes
}

# Literal persistence adapter for stone.

modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets }
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = {
				is_target_in_global_variable_list = {
					name = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets
					target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
}

modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets }
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_load_stock_record_good_stone = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_stone_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_stock_record_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_country = {

				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {

					}

				name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market

			}
		}

	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}

modeu5_load_capacity_breakdown_good_stone = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_base_capacity_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_base_capacity_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_building_capacity_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_building_capacity_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_foreign_capacity_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_foreign_capacity_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_stone = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_total
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_base_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_base
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_building_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_building
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_foreign_capacity_by_market
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_capacity_foreign
		}
	}
}

modeu5_load_transfer_records_good_stone = {
	scope:modeu5_seller_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_seller_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_source_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_seller_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	scope:modeu5_buyer_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_buyer_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_source_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_source_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_stone_market_stock|scope:modeu5_source_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_source_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_target_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_stone_market_stock|scope:modeu5_target_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_target_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_seller_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_source_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_source_market
				value = scope:modeu5_seller_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_buyer_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_target_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
				value = scope:modeu5_buyer_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_source_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_source_market
			value = scope:modeu5_source_market_stock_after
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_target_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_target_market
			value = scope:modeu5_target_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}

modeu5_read_country_stock_record_good_stone = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_load_capacity_breakdown_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_read_country_stock_record_calculate = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_stock_record = yes
}

modeu5_recalculate_country_market_capacity_good_stone = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_calculate_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_store_capacity_record_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_finalize_country_market_capacity = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_country_market_capacity = yes
}

modeu5_add_stock_good_stone = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_add_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_add_stock = yes
}

modeu5_remove_stock_good_stone = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_remove_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_remove_stock = yes
}

modeu5_transfer_stock_good_stone = {
	modeu5_load_transfer_records_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_transfer_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_transfer_records_good_stone = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_seller_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_buyer_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_transfer_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_source_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:modeu5_source_market != scope:modeu5_target_market
			}
			scope:modeu5_target_market = {
				save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
			}
			modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_transfer_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_good_stone = {
	modeu5_load_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_decay_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_stock_record_good_stone = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1
				scope:modeu5_consistency_validation_required = 1
			}
		}
		scope:modeu5_market = {
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
		}
		modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = yes
	}
	modeu5_debug_capture_decay_stock = yes
}

modeu5_decay_stock_default_good_stone = {
	modeu5_decay_stock = {
		country = scope:modeu5_default_decay_country
		market = scope:modeu5_default_decay_market
		good = stone
		decay_rate = modeu5_default_monthly_decay_rate
	}
}

modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_stone_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_scanned_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_stone = {
	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
		set_local_variable = {
			name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = 0
		}
	}

	every_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_stone_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
			scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
					add = scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock
				}
				change_local_variable = {
					name = modeu5_scan_country_source_count
					add = 1
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock < 0 }
				scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
					set_local_variable = {
						name = modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
						value = 1
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
					name = modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					value = "variable_map(modeu5_stone_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						scope:modeu5_scanned_country_stock > scope:modeu5_scanned_country_capacity
					}
					scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
						set_local_variable = {
							name = modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
							value = 1
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	scope:modeu5_consistency_controller = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_expected_market_stock
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_expected_market_stock
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_country_source_count
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_country_source_count
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_negative_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_negative_country_source_detected
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_over_cap_country_source_detected
			value = local_var:modeu5_scan_over_cap_country_source_detected
		}
	}

	modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_stone = yes
}

modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_expected_market_stock
	}
}

modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_stone = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_calculate = yes
	modeu5_store_rebuilt_market_aggregate_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_rebuild_market_stock = yes
}

modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_good_stone = {
	modeu5_scan_stock_sources_good_stone = yes
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_prepare = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_validation_difference_before != 0 }
		modeu5_rebuild_market_stock_good_stone = yes
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_validation_rebuild_called
			value = 1
		}
		modeu5_load_market_aggregate_good_stone = yes
	}
	modeu5_validate_stock_consistency_finalize = yes
	modeu5_debug_capture_validate_stock_consistency = yes
}

modeu5_validate_dirty_markets_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets }
		every_in_global_list = {
			variable = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets
			save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
			scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
				modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
					market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
					good = stone
				}
				modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
			}
		}
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_stone_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_validate_all_markets_good_stone = {
	every_market_in_world = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_reconciliation_market
		scope:modeu5_reconciliation_controller = {
			modeu5_validate_stock_consistency = {
				market = scope:modeu5_reconciliation_market
				good = stone
			}
			modeu5_reconciliation_accumulate_last_validation = yes
		}
	}
	modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_stone = yes
}

# Fault injection for the deterministic CORE-01.6 test only.
modeu5_debug_corrupt_market_stock_good_stone = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		remove_from_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
		}
	}
	add_to_global_variable_map = {
		name = modeu5_stone_market_stock
		key = scope:modeu5_market
		value = scope:modeu5_debug_corrupted_market_stock
	}
	scope:modeu5_market = {
		save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_dirty_market
	}
	modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_stone = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_location_good_stone = {
	goods:stone = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_location_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_loser
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_winner
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = stone
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_requested_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_location_good_transfer = yes
}

modeu5_core03_transfer_residual_good_stone = {
	goods:stone = { save_temporary_scope_as = modeu5_good }
	modeu5_core03_prepare_residual_good_transfer = yes
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity > 0 }
		modeu5_transfer_stock = {
			seller_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_target
			buyer_country = scope:modeu5_core03_annex_successor
			source_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			target_market = scope:modeu5_core03_market
			good = stone
			quantity = scope:modeu5_core03_residual_transfer_quantity
			target_capacity_policy = allow_over_capacity
		}
	}
	modeu5_core03_finalize_residual_good_transfer = yes
}

# Literal persistence adapter for tin.

modeu5_mark_dirty_market_good_tin = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_tin_dirty_markets }
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_tin_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = {
				is_target_in_global_variable_list = {
					name = modeu5_tin_dirty_markets
					target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_list = {
			name = modeu5_tin_dirty_markets
			target = scope:modeu5_dirty_market
		}
	}
}

modeu5_clear_dirty_markets_good_tin = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_variable_list = modeu5_tin_dirty_markets }
		clear_global_variable_list = modeu5_tin_dirty_markets
	}
}

modeu5_load_stock_record_good_tin = {
	scope:modeu5_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_tin_stock_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_tin_stock_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_tin_stock_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_before_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable_map = modeu5_tin_stock_cap_by_market
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_tin_stock_cap_by_market
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = "variable_map(modeu5_tin_stock_cap_by_market|scope:modeu5_market)"
			}
		}
		else = {
			save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
				name = modeu5_country_stock_cap_raw
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_variable_map = modeu5_tin_market_stock
			is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_tin_market_stock
				target = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = "global_variable_map(modeu5_tin_market_stock|scope:modeu5_market)"
		}
	}
	else = {
		save_temporary_scope_value_as = {
			name = modeu5_market_stock_before
			value = 0
		}
	}
}

modeu5_store_stock_record_good_tin = {
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_country_record_write_required = 1 }
		scope:modeu5_country = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_variable_map = modeu5_tin_stock_by_market
					is_key_in_variable_map = {
						name = modeu5_tin_stock_by_market
						target = scope:modeu5_market
					}
				}
				remove_from_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_tin_stock_by_market
					key = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			add_to_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_tin_stock_by_market
				key = scope:modeu5_market
				value = scope:modeu5_country_stock_after
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { scope:modeu5_market_record_write_required = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_variable_map = modeu5_tin_market_stock
				is_key_in_global_variable_map = {
					name = modeu5_tin_market_stock
					target = scope:modeu5_market
				}
			}
			remove_from_global_variable_map = {
				name = modeu5_tin_market_stock
				key = scope:modeu5_market
			}
		}
		add_to_global_variable_map = {
			name = modeu5_tin_market_stock
			key = scope:modeu5_market
			value = scope:modeu5_market_stock_after
		}
	}
}
